summary: Iteration 5 — Splash screen redesign verified against user mockup at 390x844 mobile viewport. All 25 expected text elements rendered (TANUVAS banner + funding text, doggy logo image, institution card, GUIDED BY pill + 5 doctor names, developer card with ANIMitra branding + Dr. T. Lokesh contact, Version 1.0.0 pill, L O A D I N G ... + progress bar, tap hint, copyright). Both images (TANUVAS seal 2194x2194 and dual-dog logo 434x434) loaded successfully. Tap-to-skip behavior verified — single tap navigates to /login immediately. Backend smoke test: GET /api/ returns 200 with correct payload; POST /api/calc/cytology returns 200 for valid input. Minor Expo deprecation warnings observed in console (textShadow*, shadow* style props and useNativeDriver on web).

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warning: '"textShadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "textShadow".' Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:185 (fundedBig uses textShadowColor/textShadowOffset/textShadowRadius)
Deprecation warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:199-202 (card style uses shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset)

Console warns: 'useNativeDriver is not supported because the native animated module is missing. Falling back to JS-based animation.' on web preview. Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:23 (fade animation uses useNativeDriver:true). Functionally OK on web but generates warning.

action_items: (Cosmetic only) Replace deprecated `textShadow*` props on `fundedBig` with the new `textShadow` shorthand to clear the console warning.
(Cosmetic only) Replace deprecated `shadow*` props on `card` style with `boxShadow` to clear console warning (note: keep RN `elevation` for Android).
(Optional) Set `useNativeDriver:false` on the `fade` animation (or platform-gate it) to suppress the web warning.
critical_code_review_comments: All expected mockup elements are present and correctly themed.
Pressable wraps the entire ScrollView so tap-to-skip works from anywhere on screen — verified.
Auto-route timer (6s) and tap handler are guarded by `navigated` flag to prevent double navigation — good.
Images use stable absolute URLs from customer-assets CDN; both load with valid dimensions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Splash screen at / fully matches mockup. ScrollView is used so on 390x844 the bottom (developer card, version, loading, copyright) requires scrolling — DOM text is still in document so .innerText assertions work without scrolling. Tap-to-skip routes to /login (unauth state). Backend untouched and healthy.
